notes.purpose: Document AI taxonomy for classification and metadata extraction.
recommended_pipeline: 2. Score taxonomy candidates using keywords, vendor examples, patterns, and layout hints
6. Fall back to group or ui_category if confidence is low

documents.matching_description: Official government travel ID used for international travel, usually with photo, MRZ lines, nationality, birth date, and expiry.
National civilian identity card, often including ID number, personal details, and sometimes address supplement.
Government-issued driving license with classes, driver details, and expiration date.
Permit granting residency or legal stay, often with immigration authority branding and validity dates.
Travel or immigration visa document or page authorizing entry/stay in a country.
Official birth record listing the person, birth date, place of birth, and parents.
Official certificate of marriage between two people.
Official divorce / dissolution certificate issued by a court or civil registry.
Official record confirming legal change of name.
School or university identification card used for campus access and verification.
Employee or workplace ID card used for office access and identification.
Health plan or kupat holim membership card used for healthcare services.
Periodic bank account statement listing balances and transactions.
Monthly credit card statement with charges, credits, minimum payment, and due date.
Statement summarizing debit card purchases and account-linked spending.
Periodic statement for a savings account, often showing interest and ending balance.
Brokerage or investment account statement listing holdings, trades, and valuations.
Periodic pension / retirement statement showing contributions and balance.
Statement for provident fund / gemel / long-term savings product.
Israeli keren hishtalmut statement showing contributions and current value.
Ongoing statement for a personal or business loan including principal and payments.
Mortgage account statement showing loan balance, payment due, and escrow if applicable.
Submitted annual tax return form with income, deductions, and tax due/refund.
Official tax assessment / notice from a tax authority describing calculated liability or refund.
Receipt proving payment of taxes, fees, or assessments.
Salary pay slip showing gross pay, deductions, tax, pension, and net pay.
Statement or notice for bonus payment, commission, or annual incentive.
Equity grant document describing stock options, vesting, and strike price.
Confirmation of executed buy/sell trade with symbol, quantity, price, and fees.
Brokerage notice showing dividend payment details and dates.
Exchange or wallet statement listing crypto balances, trades, or transfers.
Confirmation of one-time payment or transfer from bank/app/payment gateway.
Proof of bank wire or ACH transfer including sender, beneficiary, and reference.
Scanned bank check / cheque used for refunds, payments, or account verification.
Periodic electricity bill with customer details, usage, meter data, and amount due.
Periodic water bill from municipal or regional utility.
Utility bill for household or building gas supply.
Invoice for home internet service and related fees.

due_date.description: Payment due date — the date the charge will be submitted to the credit card or bank. In Israeli bills look for 'יוגש לחברת האשראי לא לפני' or 'תאריך לתשלום'.

total_amount.description: Total amount due including VAT (סה"כ לתשלום כולל מע"מ)

documents.matching_description: Phone / mobile service bill with lines, plans, roaming, and charges.
Bill for television / cable / streaming bundle services.
Municipal property / arnona / local tax bill.
Building committee / HOA / condo maintenance fee bill.
Recurring parking permit or parking subscription invoice.
Invoice or payment notice for school, kindergarten, university, or after-school fees.
Store receipt for in-person retail purchase.
Email/PDF confirming online purchase order and payment.
Final receipt or invoice from an online store or marketplace.
Receipt from grocery / supermarket purchase with line items.
Restaurant / café bill or receipt, often with tip and table details.
Receipt from gas station or EV charging provider.
Receipt for medicines or pharmacy products, sometimes with prescription linkage.
Receipt for electronics purchase, often linked to warranty or serial number.
Receipt for apparel / fashion purchase, often used for returns or credits.
Receipt for paid service such as cleaning, consulting, lessons, or therapy.
Receipt or invoice for repair/maintenance work.
Warranty document showing coverage term, seller/manufacturer, and product details.
Receipt documenting return, refund, or store credit issuance.
Gift card with merchant, balance, code, and sometimes expiry.
Store voucher or credit note issued instead of cash refund.
Airline credit / travel voucher issued after cancellation or compensation.
Hotel stay voucher or compensation credit usable before expiry.
Health insurance policy or coverage summary for private or employer plan.
Supplementary / extended health coverage from insurer or health fund.
Life insurance policy showing insured lives, beneficiaries, and coverage amount.
Homeowners / renters / property insurance policy.
Vehicle insurance policy, compulsory or comprehensive/third-party.
Travel insurance confirmation covering trip dates, travelers, and protections.
Dental coverage policy or member plan summary.
Coverage for disability / loss of work capacity.
Insurance policy for veterinary treatment or pet liability.
Policy covering liability exposures for small business or clinic.
Form used to file claim for medical, property, travel, or other insurance reimbursement.
Summary document describing major coverages, exclusions, limits, and co-pays.
Lease / rental agreement for residential property.
General rental contract for vehicle, equipment, or property.
Employment agreement with employer, title, salary, and terms.
Agreement restricting disclosure of confidential information.
Agreement for ongoing service delivery, maintenance, software, or consulting.
Contract for purchase of asset, property, car, or major item.
Formal mortgage agreement with lender and repayment terms.
Document authorizing someone to act on behalf of another person.
Formal court summons, hearing notice, or judicial communication.
Official fine, penalty, or violation notice requiring payment or appeal.
Parking violation notice with vehicle, location, amount, and appeal/payment deadlines.
Traffic offense notice such as speeding, bus lane, or red light violation.
General municipality notice related to fees, enforcement, or compliance.
Filled or blank government application / declaration form.
Professional license or certification required to practice a regulated profession.
Certificate or extract proving company / sole proprietor registration.
Flight booking confirmation or e-ticket with passenger, route, and dates.
Boarding pass with passenger name, flight, seat, gate, and barcode.
Hotel booking confirmation with check-in/out, guests, and booking code.
Short-term rental booking such as Airbnb or Vrbo.
Rental car confirmation with pickup/dropoff, class, and reservation number.
Cruise booking confirmation or embarkation pass.
Rail ticket / confirmation for domestic or international train travel.
Intercity / airport / coach bus ticket or QR pass.
Ticket for ferry / boat transportation.
Multi-leg itinerary summary produced by airline, agent, or booking platform.
Digital or PDF ticket for concert or live performance.
Ticket for theater, show, or performance.
Ticket for sports event with team, venue, date, and seat.
Movie theater ticket or booking confirmation.
Ticket or timed reservation for museum, park, zoo, or attraction.
Table reservation confirmation from restaurant or booking service.
Confirmation for medical, beauty, government, or service appointment.
Reserved parking spot at airport, city center, or venue.
Booking for guided tour, class, excursion, or activity.
Travel coverage confirmation linked to a specific trip.
Doctor-issued medication prescription with patient, medicine, dosage, and validity.
Laboratory results document with biomarker names, values, and ranges.
Immunization certificate / vaccination record.
Hospital discharge letter summarizing diagnosis, treatment, and follow-up.
Invoice for doctor, clinic, therapy, or medical procedure.
Approval notice for refund/reimbursement with approved amount.
Student progress report / grades certificate.
Certificate of completion for course, workshop, or training.
Academic diploma or degree certificate.
Generic school letter, consent form, or child-related education document.
Recurring invoice for software or SaaS subscription.
Gym membership contract or renewal notice.
Payment receipt for streaming media or entertainment subscription.
License certificate or email containing software license / activation details.
Statement showing available reward points or loyalty balance.
Statement or email showing cashback earned or available.
Statement for annual property tax obligations on owned real estate.
Bank statement for business checking or operating account.
Settlement report from card processor or payment gateway.
Invoice issued by a business to a customer for goods/services.
Supplier invoice for business expense or office purchase.
Purchase order document requesting goods or services from supplier.
Agreement for freelance / contractor work with scope and fees.
Contract for consulting services and deliverables.
Ongoing maintenance / support contract for equipment or service.
Installment financing plan for phone/device purchase.
Refund / credit notice from utility provider.
Utility reading / estimate notice used for billing.
Official property ownership extract / title summary.
Mortgage escrow analysis and annual statement.
Receipt for charitable donation, often used for tax deduction.
Receipt for daycare, nanny, after-school, or camp payment.
Receipt for therapy / orthotics / private healthcare service.
Notice that claim or reimbursement was rejected.
Renewal reminder or quote for expiring coverage.
Insurance quote / proposal before purchase or renewal.
Reminder to renew annual vehicle inspection.
Invoice or notice for toll road usage.
Resident / workplace parking permit.
Official vehicle registration / license document.
Maintenance history / garage service report.
Invoice for purchasing a car or motorcycle.
Agreement documenting sale of a vehicle.
Warranty / service plan for vehicle or parts.
Official statement of driving points / violations.
Manual / booklet for appliance, useful for service and specs.
Warranty certificate for appliance or electronics device.
Receipt for furniture purchase and delivery.
Document or email proving shipment delivered.
Return shipping label / authorization for sent-back item.
Notice for customs/VAT/import fees on shipment or travel goods.
Reminder/notice to renew passport before expiry.
Address supplement linked to national ID card.
Official certificate proving vaccination status.
Referral to specialist / imaging / procedure.
Radiology or imaging results summary.
Hospital invoice / patient billing statement.
Estimate or plan for dental work, often used for insurance claim.
Invoice for dental treatment.
Receipt for orthotics / insoles / assistive devices.
Record of pet vaccinations and veterinary details.
Invoice from veterinary clinic or pet treatment provider.
Payment receipt from PayPal or similar wallet.
Payment receipt from Stripe checkout or billing.
Digital receipt for app/subscription purchase from Apple.
Digital receipt for app/subscription purchase from Google Play.
Invoice generated for Amazon purchase.
Receipt for Airbnb reservation or extra charges.
Generic travel/event confirmation email.
QR or barcode-only entry pass for event or venue.
Multi-event or annual admission pass.
Ticket for festival / multi-day event.
Camp/activities registration for child.
Final hotel folio / invoice after stay.
Receipt for airfare payment, baggage, or seat charges.
Receipt for checked bags or extra luggage fee.
General trip-related receipt such as taxi, meals, or transit.
Usage statement for transit / travel smart card.
Letter approving visa/status/entry application.
Employment or tenant background screening report.
Letter confirming employer, title, and salary/employment status.
Job offer letter with role, compensation, and start date.
Record of hours worked for payroll or billing.
Compiled report of business expenses with receipts.
Agreement with vendor or supplier.
Acknowledgment of policy/terms acceptance.
Notice of updated terms or contract renewal.
